source.name: Anthropic Platform Documentation
source.update-frequency: Frequent — API releases, SDK updates, new features
source.plugin: none for doc crawling — claude-api skill and sdk-guide agent cover usage

rate-limits.known-limits: No published crawl rate limits. Mintlify-served docs.
rate-limits.decision: Largest source (607 pages). Full crawl at standard rate takes ~15-20 min. Only crawl English (/docs/en/) to avoid 7x multiplier from translations.

processing.content-extraction: CSS "main" for body, "title" for title. Fallback to "# " heading.

decisions.decision: Only crawl /docs/en/ paths. Skip /docs/de/, /docs/ja/, etc. 607 pages is already the largest source. Translations multiply by 11x.
API reference pages (400+) have repetitive structure across 9 languages. Consider adding a "section" filter to crawl only developer-guide + agent-sdk for the first pass, then expand.
